raw_consumer_statement:
I formally dispute the determination regarding the XXXX charge from The Home Depot and respectfully request reconsideration of the decision. 

The conclusion that the services or merchandise was provided as intended is not supported by the documentation previously submitted. The transaction at issue does not meet the standard of proper fulfillment as contemplated under applicable consumer billing protections, including the Fair Credit Billing Act 15 U.S.C. 1666. The goods were not provided in accordance with the terms represented at the time of sale, and therefore the charge remains subject to dispute. 

This matter extends beyond a simple delayed delivery. A merchants failure to deliver merchandise as agreed, or failure to meaningfully respond to a customer attempting to resolve a billing issue, constitutes a material breach of the transaction terms. I provided evidence demonstrating that I made multiple good faith attempts to contact the merchant directly to resolve the issue. That documentation clearly shows the merchant either refused to respond or failed to provide any substantive resolution. 

Under federal billing dispute protections, a cardholder is required to make a good faith effort to resolve disputes directly with the merchant before escalating through the card issuer. I satisfied that requirement and supplied proof of those attempts. The merchants refusal to engage should not operate to my detriment, nor should it absolve the charge from further review. 

Given the previously submitted evidence of non response and failure to properly fulfill the transaction, the finding that an error did not occur appears incomplete. I respectfully request a reinvestigation of this dispute, with specific consideration given to The documented communication attempts and lack of merchant response The failure to provide goods or services in accordance with the original agreement The applicability of consumer billing protections under federal law Until these issues are fully and fairly addressed, I maintain that the disputed amount should not be deemed valid. I request written confirmation that this matter will be reopened for further review.
